calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-07-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Inspection Demand And For Monetary Sanctions; Memo P/A
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Edward M Higginbotham, Esq., of Law Office of Edward M. Higginbotham, Tel. 415.581.0885, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
David Semel, Esq., of Haapala, Thompson & Abern, LLP, Tel. 510.763.2324, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. PLAINTIFF KAI KOPP'S Motion To Compel Compliance With Inspection Demand And For Monetary Sanctions - Motion is granted. There is good cause for an additional inspection and no discernable prejudice to defendants if one occurs. Request for sanctions is denied. Plaintiff to provide defendant with protocol. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
